title: LuckyBindings
description: Minecraft client mod that lets players create customizable keybindings for commands, chat actions, player movements, and automated tasks, making gameplay more efficient and accessible on any server.
body:
# LuckyBindings

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-Available-brightgreen)](https://modrinth.com/mod/luckybindings) 
[![GitHub issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/LuckyLuuk12/LuckyBindings)](https://github.com/LuckyLuuk12/LuckyBindings/issues) 
![License: All Rights Reserved](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-All%20Rights%20Reserved-red)

---

## Overview
**LuckyBindings** is a Minecraft client-side mod that allows players to create **custom keybindings for advanced actions**. Perfect for servers with **many commands, chat interactions, and roleplay mechanics**.  

> ⚠ **Disclaimer:** This mod is **not affiliated** with any server, including [SchoolRP](https://schoolrp.net/). It is a personal project created to enhance gameplay.

---

## Features
- **Custom Keybindings** – assign any key to execute “Actions”.  
- **Execute Commands** – run server or client commands with a single key.  
- **Chat Automation** – prepare messages for quick chat execution.  
- **Pathfinding Actions** – automatically follow a path of specific blocks.  
- **Player Movements** – nod, wave, or trigger custom animations with keybinds.  
- **Dynamic Config** – configure keybinds and action parameters in-game.  

---

## Why LuckyBindings?
- **Highly configurable** – add, remove, or change keybinds and actions on the fly.  
- **Extensible** – new actions can be added by other developers.  
- **Multi-server friendly** – works with different Minecraft servers without modification.  
- **Searchable & discoverable** – supports all standard keybinding and action types.  

---

## Development
Contributions are welcome! Fork on [GitHub](https://github.com/LuckyLuuk12/LuckyBindings) and submit **pull requests**.  
Please ensure **code quality** and test your changes; this is a **personal project** maintained in spare time.

---

## Planned Features
- **Server GUIs** – open in-game screens with:
  - Online player lists & info
  - Server statistics (ping, player count, etc)
- **Automation Actions** – automate repetitive or common tasks  
- **Enhanced Config UI** – dynamic menus for custom keybinds & action parameters  

---

## Keywords / Tags
`keybinds`, `keybindings`, `actions`, `commands`, `minecraft`, `client-mod`, `automation`, `pathfinding`, `player-movement`, `roleplay`, `mod`, `multi-loader`
